docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORJA, DIANA
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BORJA, DIANA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00 <WAIVED>); REMARKS: ABRAHAM REYES-ZERMENO CAME TO SAN FRANCISCO CITY HALL AND WAS SERVED. SERVED JUL-28-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REYES-ZERMENO, ABRAHAM
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,016.35 FILED BY BORJA, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT REYES-ZERMENO, ABRAHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: ADDRESS UPDATE. (SEE DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS) FILED BY DEFENDANT REYES-ZERMENO, ABRAHAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2021 - JUDGMENT. MATTER WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 9-21-21. AFTER HEARING JUDGMENT WAS ISSUED. PLAINTIFF DIANA BORJA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABRAHAM REYES-ZERMENO IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORJA, DIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REYES-ZERMENO, ABRAHAM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
